taxonomy: Wurdastom subglabra is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to Jamaica. The classification of Wurdastom subglabra is as follows: the Kingdom is Plantae, the Phylum is Magnoliophyta, the Class is Magnoliopsida, the Order is Gentianales, the Family is Rubiaceae, the Genus is Wurdastom, and the Species is W. subglabra. This plant is a member of the large and diverse Rubiaceae family. Further classification information may be available through botanical databases or scientific publications.
